#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using System.Linq;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for registering services from TestAssembly.
    /// </summary>
    public static class TestAssemblyServiceCollectionExtensions
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Registers all default services.
        /// </summary>
        public static IServiceCollection AddTestAssembly(this IServiceCollection services)
        {
            services.AddSingleton(typeof(global::TestNamespace.Logger<>), typeof(global::TestNamespace.Logger<>));
            services.AddSingleton(typeof(global::TestNamespace.ILogger<>), typeof(global::TestNamespace.Logger<>));
            services.AddSingleton(typeof(global::TestNamespace.GenericRequestHandler<>), typeof(global::TestNamespace.GenericRequestHandler<>));
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.ViewModel, global::TestNamespace.ViewModel>();
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.GenericRequestHandler<global::TestNamespace.Entity>, global::TestNamespace.GenericRequestHandler<global::TestNamespace.Entity>>();
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IRequestHandler<global::TestNamespace.GenericRequest<global::TestNamespace.Entity>, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<global::TestNamespace.Entity>>>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) =>
            {
                var s0 = sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.GenericRequestHandler<global::TestNamespace.Entity>>();
                var s1 = new global::TestNamespace.HandlerDecorator2<global::TestNamespace.GenericRequest<global::TestNamespace.Entity>, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<global::TestNamespace.Entity>>(s0);
                var s2_p0 = sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.ILogger<global::TestNamespace.HandlerDecorator1<global::TestNamespace.GenericRequest<global::TestNamespace.Entity>, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<global::TestNamespace.Entity>>>>();
                var s2 = new global::TestNamespace.HandlerDecorator1<global::TestNamespace.GenericRequest<global::TestNamespace.Entity>, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<global::TestNamespace.Entity>>(s1, s2_p0);
                return s2;
            });
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.Logger<global::TestNamespace.HandlerDecorator1<global::TestNamespace.GenericRequest<global::TestNamespace.Entity>, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<global::TestNamespace.Entity>>>, global::TestNamespace.Logger<global::TestNamespace.HandlerDecorator1<global::TestNamespace.GenericRequest<global::TestNamespace.Entity>, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<global::TestNamespace.Entity>>>>();
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.ILogger<global::TestNamespace.HandlerDecorator1<global::TestNamespace.GenericRequest<global::TestNamespace.Entity>, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<global::TestNamespace.Entity>>>>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.Logger<global::TestNamespace.HandlerDecorator1<global::TestNamespace.GenericRequest<global::TestNamespace.Entity>, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<global::TestNamespace.Entity>>>>());

            return services;
        }
    }
}
